projects.name: Automated Print Integration
projects.description: Built an automated workflow to sync orders and inventory between Printify and Printful.
projects.objective: Reduce manual data entry and errors between platforms.
projects.impact: Saved 15+ hours of manual work weekly, improved order accuracy.

projects.name: Amazon Retail Payments Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a dashboard to monitor Amazon payment transactions and support tickets.
projects.objective: Provide real-time insights for technical support teams.
projects.impact: Reduced response time by 30%, improved tracking accuracy.

projects.name: Shopee Chat Support Automation
projects.description: Created an automated chat support system to handle common customer inquiries.
projects.objective: Reduce repetitive queries handled by agents.
projects.impact: Increased agent productivity by 25%, faster response for customers.

projects.name: Google My Business Expansion Tracker
projects.description: Built a workflow to track business area expansion and monitor GMB listings.
projects.objective: Streamline expansion monitoring without manual checks.
projects.impact: Saved hours weekly, reduced missed updates.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio showcasing projects and skills.
projects.objective: Create an interactive, responsive portfolio site.
projects.impact: Improved online presence and project visibility.

projects.name: E-commerce Admin Dashboard
projects.description: Developed a dashboard to manage products, orders, and inventory for an online store.
projects.objective: Centralize management and reduce manual reporting.
projects.impact: Streamlined operations, reduced reporting errors by 40%.
